summary: Adjusted the opening to carry the return below from chapter 7 and sharpened the closing laundry-bundle image so it hands cleanly into chapter 9 without changing chapter beats or character voice.
edits: Anchored the first paragraph to the group's return under the hill after the previous chapter's escape.
Sharpened the final sentence so Elise's disguise as a woman carrying damp washing leads directly into the next chapter's reserve-cache handoff.
